mapper.select: SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'McashCanBaseDate' AND DTL_CD = 'baseDate' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_MCASH_CAN_TRG SET PROC_YN = 'T' ,RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' ,RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE PROC_YN = 'N' AND EVNT_TRTM_DT > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{baseDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

UPDATE NMCP_MCASH_CAN_TRG SET PROC_YN = 'X' ,RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' ,RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE (CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT B.CONTRACT_NUM FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER A ,NMCP_MCASH_CAN_TRG B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.STATUS = 'S') OR CAN_TRG_SEQ IN (SELECT CAN_TRG_SEQ FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNK, CAN_TRG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM FROM NMCP_MCASH_CAN_TRG ) WHERE RNK != 1 ) ) AND PROC_YN ='T'

UPDATE NMCP_MCASH_CAN_TRG A SET (A.USERID ,A.CUSTOMER_ID ,A.SVC_CNTR_NO ,A.RVISN_ID ,A.RVISN_DTTM) = ( SELECT B.USERID ,B.CUSTOMER_ID ,B.SVC_CNTR_NO ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.STATUS = 'S') WHERE A.PROC_YN = 'T'
mapper.select: SELECT CAN_TRG_SEQ ,USERID ,CUSTOMER_ID ,CONTRACT_NUM ,SVC_CNTR_NO ,EVNT_CD ,EVNT_DT FROM NMCP_MCASH_CAN_TRG WHERE PROC_YN = 'T'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_MCASH_USER_HIST ( HIST_SEQ , USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL , EVNT_DT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_MCASH_USER_HIST.NEXTVAL , USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL , EVNT_DT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM ( SELECT USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL , EVNT_DT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER WHERE USERID = #{userid} ORDER BY RVISN_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'McashCanBaseDate' AND DTL_CD = 'retryDate' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_MCASH_CAN_TRG SET PROC_YN = 'T' ,RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' ,RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE PROC_YN = 'E' AND PROC_DTTM > SYSDATE - #{retryDate}
